description_long: This object consists of a group of towels, each rolled into a compact cylindrical shape. The towels are arranged in two separate clusters, with one group containing more rolls than the other. The surface of each towel appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or embellishments. The towels are a light, neutral color, likely white or off-white, and exhibit a soft, matte finish typical of cotton or terry cloth. The edges of the rolls are neatly aligned, suggesting careful handling and arrangement. There are no visible stains, tears, or brand labels on any of the towels.
description: A set of neatly rolled, light-colored towels arranged in two clusters, with a soft and smooth appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ends of the rolled towels stacked in two groups, with the circular roll patterns visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical shape of each towel roll and the separation between the two clusters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite ends of the rolled towels, similar to the front but with the rolls facing away.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, again showing the cylindrical rolls and the two distinct clusters.
